assertions.assertion: AddOperationalStore options set EnableTokenCleanup to false
assertions.rationale: Disabling cleanup on web nodes is a logical step an LLM would infer.

assertions.assertion: A class inheriting from BackgroundService (or IHostedService) is created named TokenCleanupWorker or similar
assertions.rationale: BackgroundService is standard ASP.NET Core pattern.

assertions.assertion: The worker class injects or resolves TokenCleanupService from Duende.IdentityServer.EntityFramework
assertions.rationale: The specific TokenCleanupService class from Duende.IdentityServer.EntityFramework is a Duende-specific service name.

assertions.assertion: The ExecuteAsync method calls CleanupGrantsAsync() in a while loop that respects the CancellationToken
assertions.rationale: The specific method name CleanupGrantsAsync() is Duende-specific.

assertions.assertion: The delay between cleanup runs is 2 hours (TimeSpan.FromHours(2) or equivalent)
assertions.rationale: The delay value comes from the prompt and an LLM would use it.
